case_title: SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS vs. DEMUS, LOIS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS AS TO DEFENDANT DEMUS, LOIS DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEMUS, LOIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 31 BEATRICE LANE, #5, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124 $289.00 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $689.00, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTORNEY FEES INCLUDES COSTS. EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT STAYED ON CONDITIONS AS STATED IN THE JUDGMENT.
